subject: Add tuned MoE kernel config for Gemma4 on MI350X
description: No tuned config exists for E=128, N=704 on AMD_Instinct_MI350X. The default config uses very small block sizes. Create an optimized config tuned for this model's MoE dimensions (128 experts, 704 intermediate, 2816 hidden).
activeForm: Creating tuned MoE kernel config for MI350X
